working_on: Session β: harness mechanization per the approved infrastructure plan — three new .claude/settings.json hooks (PostToolUse-on-ADR-write enforcing two-layer recording, SessionStart computing cadence + persistent-warn surface, PostToolUse-on-STATE.md-edit verifying required fields), three new shell scripts under engine/tools/hooks/, skill conversion of recipe-shaped operations docs to user-defined skills under .claude/skills/, cadence-trigger off-by-one fix, ADRs 0043 (hook-architecture) and 0044 (skill-conversion-recipe-vs-reference).
outcome_summary: Session β delivered. Two engine ADRs (0043 hook architecture, 0044 skill conversion recipe-vs-reference). Three non-blocking hook scripts (post-adr-write, session-start, post-state-edit) wired into .claude/settings.json. Three user-defined Skills under .claude/skills/ with disable-model-invocation: true; ops doc headers updated to point at canonical Skill invocation. Cadence-trigger off-by-one fixed across five carriers (start-engine.md, health-check.md, session-build-lifecycle.md, session-start.sh, ADR 0022 amendment); three straggler references in ROADMAP.md, build_plan/00_session_schedule.md, docs/health-checks/README.md surfaced by cold-review and corrected. CLAUDE.md narrowed: two-layer recording + STATE.md required-fields + cadence trigger move from posture to soft-enforced machinery. Cold-review pass surfaced three real findings (ADR 0043 third post-state-edit check unimplemented; cadence stragglers; session-build-lifecycle.md Layer 1 doc drift behind skill body) — all three resolved in-session per ADR 0036 amendment asymmetry. Validator at close: 14 checks, 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. ADR count: 44 total (42 Accepted + 2 Superseded; 11 engine + 33 product). Boot-time deferral: pre-fix cadence trigger fired at S-0031 boot per old logic; deferred per the approved plan (audit just ran at S-0030); proceeded with planned Session β work.
